reason: The omitted qualifier "本クラスが初期化する" adds technical precision but does not change practical guidance. In the context of NablarchServletContextListener, there is only one repository being initialized — the one configured via di.config. A developer reading the knowledge file would naturally understand "リポジトリ内に" to mean the repository set up by this listener, as no other repository is in scope. The web.xml example in s2 reinforces this by showing a single di.config-driven setup. The omission is a minor loss of precision with no realistic path to developer confusion or misconfiguration.

findings_assessment.location: s1 — 関連するハンドラ table
findings_assessment.justification: The qualifier '本クラスが初期化する' scopes the repository requirement to the one configured via di.config. However, in the architecture described by this file, NablarchServletContextListener initializes exactly one repository — so the scoping is already implied by context. A developer configuring WebFrontController would invariably place it in the di.config repository because no other repository exists at this initialization stage. The Phase E log is empty, indicating the fix loop did not execute (likely the Phase E agent judged the finding below the threshold for correction, or the phase was skipped).
